entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[DQC.US.0011.6826] It is expected that MinorityInterest with a value of -315,243 reported in the network role http://kunpenginternationalltd.com/role/BalanceSheets, http://kunpenginternationalltd.com/role/ScheduleOfVieAssetsAndLiabilitiesIncludedInConsolidatedBalanceSheetsDetails, http://kunpenginternationalltd.com/role/ScheduleOfVieOfBalanceSheetDetails should be equal to the dimensionally qualified concept, StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the dimension us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis = us-gaap:NoncontrollingInterestMember and a reported value of 315,243 multiplied by 1. This value appears in the network role http://kunpenginternationalltd.com/role/StatementOfChangesInStockholdersDeficit. This error occurs when the dimensionally qualified fact is not equal to the value input for the non dimensional item.
The properties of this us-gaap:MinorityInterest fact are:
Period : 2024-03-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of MinorityInterest : 0 Decimals of StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest : 0 Rule version: 29.0.2 - KPEA_instance_2024_2025.xml 3283

[DQC.US.0011.6829] It is expected that StockholdersEquity with a value of -5,884,192 reported in the network role http://kunpenginternationalltd.com/role/ScheduleOfVieAssetsAndLiabilitiesIncludedInConsolidatedBalanceSheetsDetails, http://kunpenginternationalltd.com/role/ScheduleOfVieOfBalanceSheetDetails, http://kunpenginternationalltd.com/role/BalanceSheets should be equal to the dimensionally qualified concept, StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest with the dimension us-gaap:StatementEquityComponentsAxis = us-gaap:ParentMember and a reported value of -5,844,192 multiplied by 1. This value appears in the network role http://kunpenginternationalltd.com/role/StatementOfChangesInStockholdersDeficit. This error occurs when the dimensionally qualified fact is not equal to the value input for the non dimensional item.
The properties of this us-gaap:StockholdersEquity fact are:
Period : 2024-03-31 Dimensions : Unit : USD Decimals of StockholdersEquity : 0 Decimals of StockholdersEquityIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest : 0 Rule version: 29.0.2 - KPEA_instance_2024_2025.xml 3100
